<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
targets = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':

        targets.append((cr, cc))

action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c for r, c in targets])
